revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-5-470

Alternative term: Determinate simple

A term applied to a structure which is provided with the minimum required number of nodes so that bending moments, forces, and reactions can be determined by the laws of equilibrium alone.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Isostatic}}
